Let every man go to with his might ; let him take righteousness and truth for his girdle; the spirit of God for his compass, and steer his course through this generation to the haven of eternal life, studiously avoiding all the rocks and shoals on the passage. Brethren, may your voice be indeed the voice of God. Farewell for the present. You may hear from us again. — Ed.
